title: Reasoning, Planning, Decomposition, and Verification · Contract Workshop
summary: Prompt a difficult migration without exposing or demanding hidden reasoning. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a plan-execute-verify task contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.
Use planning before implementation when scope, dependencies, or user choices are materially uncertain.
Decompose work around independently verifiable outcomes and dependency order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
workshop case — Use a changed workshop case for prompt reasoning planning that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

What must be established before implementation?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for request concise conclusions, evidence, and checks rather than hidden chain-of-thought disclosure.

content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Reasoning Selection condition decided your prediction.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-uncertainty-report-1swfy0" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Uncertainty Report into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-uncertainty-report-1swfy0
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
